name: ipcompass
description: IP Compass - 个人 IP 内容诊断与陪跑系统（F000 注册登录 MVP）

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.release:check: node scripts/sanitize-check.js && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.deploy: npm run release:check && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:pages
